phrases.text_local: Como posso chegar ao Miradouro do Ouro?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo PAW-soo shih-GAHR OW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO OHW-roo?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Miradouro do Ouro.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO OHW-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Miradouro do Ouro.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Miradouro do Ouro.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO OHW-roo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Miradouro do Ouro.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Praça da República?
phrases.pronunciation: OHN-jee FEE-kah ah PRAH-sah dah heh-POO-blee-kah?

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um guia local ou ao guarda municipal perto das Portas da Vila.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG GEEUH loo-KAHL OHW OW GWAH-ruh-duh moo-nee-see-PAHL PEHR-too DUHSH POH-ruh-tuhsh DUH VEE-luh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask a local guide or the city guard near Portas da Vila.

responses.english: Ask a local guide or the city guard near Portas da Vila.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG GEEUH loo-KAHL OHW OW GWAH-ruh-duh moo-nee-see-PAHL PEHR-too DUHSH POH-ruh-tuhsh DUH VEE-luh.
responses.french: Pergunte a um guia local ou ao guarda municipal perto das Portas da Vila.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar um bom restaurante perto da Praça da República?
phrases.pronunciation: OHN-dee POH-soo ehn-kohn-TRAHR oong bohm rehs-tow-RAHN-chee PEHR-too dah PRAH-sah dah reh-POO-blee-kah

likely_response.local: Pergunte no quiosque de turismo perto das Portas da Vila sobre restaurantes na Praça da República.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NOO KEEOHSH-kih DIH too-REEZH-moo PEHR-too DUHSH POH-ruh-tuhsh DUH VEE-luh SOHB-rih rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tihsh NUH PRAH-suh DUH reh-POOB-lee-kuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the tourist information kiosk near Portas da Vila about restaurants at Praça da República.

responses.english: Ask at the tourist information kiosk near Portas da Vila about restaurants at Praça da República.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NOO KEEOHSH-kih DIH too-REEZH-moo PEHR-too DUHSH POH-ruh-tuhsh DUH VEE-luh SOHB-rih rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tihsh NUH PRAH-suh DUH reh-POOB-lee-kuh.
responses.french: Pergunte no quiosque de turismo perto das Portas da Vila sobre restaurantes na Praça da República.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Rua dos Bombeiros is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica exatamente a Rua dos Bombeiros?
phrases.cultural_note: Locals navigate by main squares; street names reflect historical functions.

likely_response.local: Fica perto da Praça da República.
likely_response.pronunciation: FEE-kuh PEHR-too DUH PRAH-suh DUH reh-POOB-lee-kuh.
likely_response.translation_en: It is near Praça da República.

responses.english: It is near Praça da República.
responses.phonetic: FEE-kuh PEHR-too DUH PRAH-suh DUH reh-POOB-lee-kuh.
responses.french: Fica perto da Praça da República.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Miradouro do Ouro is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Miradouro do Ouro?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO OHW-roo?
phrases.cultural_note: Miradouro do Ouro is a scenic viewpoint overlooking the coast and old town.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao guia local na Praça da República.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH loo-KAHL NUH PRAH-suh DUH reh-POOB-lee-kuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the local guide at Praça da República.

responses.english: Ask the local guide at Praça da República.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH loo-KAHL NUH PRAH-suh DUH reh-POOB-lee-kuh.
responses.french: Pergunte ao guia local na Praça da República.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Portas da Vila is
phrases.text_local: Podia indicar o caminho para as Portas da Vila?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-DEEUH een-dee-KAHR AW kuh-MEE-nyoo PUH-ruh UHSH POH-ruh-tuhsh DUH VEE-luh?
phrases.cultural_note: Historic gate marks the old town boundary; residents use it as a primary landmark.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para as Portas da Vila.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH POH-ruh-tuhsh DUH VEE-luh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Portas da Vila.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Portas da Vila.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH POH-ruh-tuhsh DUH VEE-luh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para as Portas da Vila.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Igreja Matriz church is
phrases.text_local: Scusi, onde fica a Igreja Matriz?
phrases.pronunciation: skoo-ZEE, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH eeg-REH-zhuh muht-REESH?
phrases.cultural_note: Igreja Matriz is the main church in Albufeira's old town, often referenced by locals.

likely_response.local: Na Rua dos Bombeiros, à direita.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUH ROOUH DOOSH boom-BAY-roosh, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: On Rua dos Bombeiros, on the right.

responses.english: On Rua dos Bombeiros, on the right.
responses.phonetic: NUH ROOUH DOOSH boom-BAY-roosh, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
responses.french: Na Rua dos Bombeiros, à direita.
